author: anon-ab6221f8
content: This refactor is partially complete. Core enums (IssueStatus, Priority) are defined with serde, rusqlite, Display, FromStr implementations. The data layer (models, db, hydration, compaction, checkpoint, issue_file, shared_writer) and server handlers are fully converted and all 1665 lib tests pass. Remaining: ~22 mechanical fixes in CLI commands and TUI display code where string formatting needs .to_string()/.as_str() calls. The type safety benefit is already achieved — the DB and serialization boundaries enforce valid values at compile time.
